gt_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T2.status FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN legalities AS T2 ON T2.uuid = T1.uuid WHERE T1.frameVersion = 1997 AND T1.hasContentWarning = 1 AND T1.artist = 'D. Alexander Gregory' AND T2.format = 'legacy'
pred_sql:
SELECT l.status
FROM cards c
JOIN legalities l ON c.uuid = l.uuid
WHERE c.frameVersion = '1997'
  AND c.artist = 'D. Alexander Gregory'
  AND c.hasContentWarning = 1
  AND l.format = 'legacy';
question: Among the cards whose version of frame style is 1997, what is the status of the card illustrated by D. Alexander Gregory in legacy play format that has sensitive content or Wizards of the Coast?
